mission_description: Artemis 2 Orbit Animation - NASA's first crewed Artemis lunar mission
mission_keywords: artemis, artemis2, artemis ii, orion, integrity, moon, nasa, sls, space, astronomy, animation

ui.pageTitle: NASA's Artemis 2 Mission 2026 - An Orbit Animation

missionStart.label: Launch
missionStart.infoText: Launch: 1st Apr 2026, 22:24 UTC - SLS launches Artemis II from Kennedy Space Center LC-39B

solarArrays.label: Solar Arrays
solarArrays.infoText: 1st Apr 2026, 22:44 UTC - Orion deploys solar arrays in Earth orbit

perigeeRaise1.label: Perigee Raise
perigeeRaise1.infoText: 1st Apr 2026, 23:13 UTC - Perigee raise maneuver targeting a 2223 x 185 km Earth orbit

apogeeRaise.label: Apogee Raise
apogeeRaise.infoText: 2nd Apr 2026, 00:11:57 UTC - Apogee raise maneuver targeting 70,377 km

icpsSeparation.label: ICPS Sep
icpsSeparation.infoText: 2nd Apr 2026, 01:48:18 UTC - Orion separates from the ICPS; the published HORIZONS trajectory begins here

upperStageSeparationBurn.label: Upper Stage Burn
upperStageSeparationBurn.infoText: 2nd Apr 2026, 03:16 UTC - Orion upper stage separation burn

icpsDisposalPacific.label: ICPS Disposal
icpsDisposalPacific.infoText: 2nd Apr 2026, 03:24 UTC - ICPS disposal burn for Pacific splashdown

icpsDisposalAtlantic.label: ICPS Alt Disposal
icpsDisposalAtlantic.infoText: 2nd Apr 2026, 03:26 UTC - Alternate ICPS disposal burn for Atlantic splashdown

cubesatDeploy.label: CubeSats Deploy
cubesatDeploy.infoText: 2nd Apr 2026, 03:28 UTC - International partner CubeSats begin deploying at one-minute intervals

perigeeRaise2.label: Perigee Raise 2
perigeeRaise2.infoText: 2nd Apr 2026, 12:08 UTC - Perigee raise burn late on flight day 1

tli.label: TLI
tli.infoText: 3rd Apr 2026, 21:56 UTC - Trans-lunar injection burn begins and lasts roughly 8 minutes

trajectoryCorrection1.label: OTC-1
trajectoryCorrection1.infoText: 3rd Apr 2026, 22:31 UTC - Orbit trajectory correction burn #1

trajectoryCorrection2.label: OTC-2
trajectoryCorrection2.infoText: 4th Apr 2026, 22:36 UTC - Orbit trajectory correction burn #2

trajectoryCorrection3.label: OTC-3
trajectoryCorrection3.infoText: 6th Apr 2026, 03:47 UTC - Orbit trajectory correction burn #3

lunarSoiEntry.label: Lunar SOI In
lunarSoiEntry.infoText: 6th Apr 2026, 05:23 UTC - Orion enters the Moon's sphere of influence

closestApproach.label: Lunar Flyby
closestApproach.infoText: 6th Apr 2026, 23:47 UTC - Closest approach to the Moon during Artemis II's crewed lunar flyby

maxDistanceEarth.label: Max Distance
maxDistanceEarth.infoText: 6th Apr 2026, 23:50 UTC - Orion reaches maximum distance from Earth

lunarSoiExit.label: Lunar SOI Out
lunarSoiExit.infoText: 7th Apr 2026, 18:11 UTC - Orion exits the Moon's sphere of influence

returnCorrection1.label: RTC-1
returnCorrection1.infoText: 8th Apr 2026, 02:47 UTC - Return trajectory correction burn #1

manualPiloting.label: Manual Demo
manualPiloting.infoText: 9th Apr 2026, 02:44 UTC - Crew manual piloting demonstration during the return leg

returnCorrection2.label: RTC-2
returnCorrection2.infoText: 10th Apr 2026, 02:57 UTC - Return trajectory correction burn #2

returnCorrection3.label: RTC-3
returnCorrection3.infoText: 10th Apr 2026, 18:57 UTC - Return trajectory correction burn #3

serviceModuleSeparation.label: CSM Separation
serviceModuleSeparation.infoText: 10th Apr 2026, 23:37 UTC - Orion crew and service module separation

crewModuleRaiseBurn.label: CM Raise Burn
crewModuleRaiseBurn.infoText: 10th Apr 2026, 23:40 UTC - Crew module raise burn before atmospheric entry

entryInterface.label: Entry Interface
entryInterface.infoText: 10th Apr 2026, 23:57 UTC - Entry interface at 122 km above Earth. Later descent milestones listed in HORIZONS include forward bay cover deployment at 11 km, drogue parachute deployment at 7.6 km, and pilot parachute deployment at 2.9 km, but HORIZONS does not publish absolute timestamps for those sub-events.

splashdown.label: Splashdown
splashdown.infoText: 11th Apr 2026, 00:10 UTC - Pacific splashdown near Baja California after the nominal 10-day Artemis II mission

finalPowerDown.label: Power Down
finalPowerDown.infoText: 11th Apr 2026, 00:25 UTC - Orion final power down
